name: Cookie Sheet Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt. Mix well.
2. In a saucepan, add margarine, oil, water, and cocoa. Bring to a boil and add to the flour mixture; stir well.
3. Add eggs, buttermilk, and baking soda. Mix well.
4. Pour batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
ICING:
1. Mix all icing ingredients until smooth.
2. Frost the cake immediately after removing it from the oven.
